name: E-Z Money Pawn Shop
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in Omaha, NE since 1979 offering pawn loans, vehicle loans, and sales of used firearms, jewelry, electronics, tools, and music equipment.
description_long:
E-Z Money Pawn and Jewelry has operated as a family-owned business in Omaha, Nebraska since 1979. Over more than 40 years, the company has built relationships with customers throughout Nebraska and surrounding states, establishing itself as a stable presence in the local pawn industry. The business maintains two physical locations in the Millard and South Omaha areas.

The company offers traditional pawn loans secured by collateral including firearms, jewelry, electronics, tools, music equipment, and vehicles. They also provide vehicle loans and FFL (Federal Firearms License) transfer services. E-Z Money maintains an expanded online presence, including a large selection of used guns, ammunition, and accessories listed on gunbroker.com, and operates an e-commerce website to serve customers unable to visit their physical locations. Their stated mission emphasizes providing high-quality products at competitive prices.

E-Z Money distinguishes itself through longevity and family ownership in a market dominated by chain operators. The company has diversified beyond traditional pawn lending into online retail channels and specialized services like FFL transfers. Their dual-location strategy provides accessibility across different Omaha neighborhoods, and their online presence extends their reach beyond the immediate geographic area.

As a pawn shop, E-Z Money serves customers needing quick cash against collateral or seeking used merchandise. The main caveat is that pawn loans carry implicit high costs due to short terms and interest rates, and the company provides no information about specific APRs, terms, or loan structures on their website. Customers should carefully understand pawn loan economics before pledging items.
pros: Family-owned and operated since 1979 with 40+ years of local market presence
Two convenient locations in Millard and South Omaha areas
Extended hours including Saturday service (9am-5pm) and weekday availability until 6pm
Offers FFL transfer services for firearms purchases
Vehicle loan options available in addition to standard pawn loans
Expanded online sales through gunbroker.com for firearms and accessories
E-commerce website enables 24/7 shopping for customers unable to visit physical locations
cons: No specific information provided about loan terms, APRs, or interest rates on the website
Limited transparency about pawn loan processes and repayment structures despite having 'Pawn Loan Info' menu item
No mention of customer reviews, ratings, or third-party verification of service quality
Minimal detail about what items qualify for loans or typical loan amounts
No information about fees, storage costs, or redemption terms
best_for: Omaha-area residents needing quick cash against collateral (jewelry, firearms, electronics, tools)
Used firearms buyers seeking FFL transfer services at a local shop
Vehicle owners seeking short-term collateral loans in Nebraska and surrounding states
Online shoppers looking for used firearms and ammunition with secure 24/7 shopping access
diagnosis: E-Z Money is best for Omaha-area consumers with collateral who need immediate cash or residents seeking used firearms and outdoor equipment at competitive prices. The primary caveat is that the website lacks essential pawn loan transparency—borrowers should contact the shop directly to understand specific terms, interest rates, and redemption conditions before pledging items.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal items and collateral
Retail sales of used firearms and ammunition
Used music equipment pawning and sales
In-person shopping at two Omaha locations
Phone-based customer service at two locations
